Home / Categories

Scam categories

Browse guides by scam type. Each category covers a specific pattern — from SMS phishing to marketplace fraud to government impersonation.

Marketplace Scams

Guides covering Facebook Marketplace, Gumtree, Vinted, eBay, and other UK buying and selling platforms.

9 guides

Payment Scams

Guides covering bank transfer fraud, advance fees, fake invoices, and payment-related scams targeting UK consumers.

9 guides

Text Message Scams

Guides covering fake delivery texts, bank impersonation SMS, HMRC alerts, and other smishing attacks targeting UK phones.

7 guides

Crypto Scams

Guides covering fake investment platforms, withdrawal fee traps, romance fraud, and cryptocurrency scam tactics.

5 guides

Website Scams

Guides covering fake online shops, lookalike domains, and how to verify an unfamiliar website before buying.

4 guides

Government Impersonation

Guides covering HMRC, DVLA, TV Licensing, and other government impersonation scams targeting UK residents.

4 guides

Employment Scams

Guides covering fake job ads, work-from-home schemes, and advance-fee employment fraud.

4 guides

Tech Support Scams

Guides covering fake tech support calls, remote access scams, and malicious software targeting UK users.

4 guides

Fraud & Impersonation

Guides covering recovery scams, impersonation fraud, and other scam patterns targeting UK consumers.

4 guides

Romance & Dating Scams

Guides covering romance scams, fake profiles, and relationship fraud on dating apps and social platforms.

3 guides

Shopping Scams

Guides covering fake online retailers, counterfeit goods, pet scams, and marketplace shopping fraud.

3 guides

Social Media Scams

Guides covering scams on Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, and other social media platforms.

3 guides

Email Scams

Guides covering phishing emails, business email compromise, fake invoices, and email impersonation tactics.

3 guides

Travel Scams

Guides covering fake holiday listings, advance-fee travel fraud, and ticket scams.

2 guides

Phone Scams

Guides covering vishing calls, fake bank calls, HMRC phone scams, and other voice-based fraud.

2 guides

Investment & Finance Scams

Guides covering fake investment opportunities, pension fraud, and financial impersonation scams.

2 guides

Utility Scams

Guides covering fake energy supplier calls, smart meter scams, and utility impersonation tactics.

1 guide

Beat the Scam

Scam alerts, plain-English checks, and practical guides to help people verify suspicious emails, texts, websites, calls, and offers.

Educational content only. Not legal, regulatory, or financial advice.
